an7.94:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, there are these seven who are of good character. What seven?
an7.94:1.2: One endowed with faith, one with a sense of moral shame, one with moral dread, one who is learned, one who is energetic, one who is mindful, and one who is wise.
an7.94:2.1: These are the seven who are of good character."
